108 K6A K6A_TOTAL_CALORIES 30a(K6a)Parenteral or Enteral Intake CHAR 1 A record of the proportion of calories received and the average fluid intake, through parenteral or tube feeding in the last seven days. 0 = None, 1 = 1% to 25%, 2 = 26% to 50%, 3 = 51% to 75%, 4 = 76% to 100%, -1 = Unknown, -2 = Space
